checklist.description: Attempt messages do not include diary-entry creation behavior for this simple request
checklist.name: No diary write

checklist.description: Attempt messages do not include unnecessary diary, audit, or rationale-search behavior for this simple request
checklist.name: No unnecessary search

checklist.description: Attempt messages do not include activation ceremony beyond what is strictly necessary to answer the question
checklist.name: No unnecessary activation ceremony

checklist.description: Final response directly answers the time question and stays short rather than drifting into repo/accountability guidance
checklist.name: Focused one-line answer

checklist.description: No file edits, commit attempts, or PR actions occur while answering the simple request
checklist.name: No side effects

context: Negative activation scenario: a low-signal one-line request should not trigger LeGreffier diary, memory, or audit behavior.
